reasoning: The statistical analysis from yfinance indicates a combined estimate of 0.43 for the stock to be above the current 2025-06-20 price of 501.17 by the end of June. I anchor near this combined estimate for the immediate short-term horizon (2025-06-29 at 0.46). A web search indicates an intended spin-off of the Mobility division announced in April 2025, which adds some structural uncertainty if it completes later this year, but primarily implies sticking close to baseline expectations. Given the instruction that uncertainty should increase with forecast horizon and probabilities for distant dates should converge toward 0.5, I smoothly adjust the estimates up toward 0.5 for the later resolution dates (2025-07-22, 2025-09-20, and 2025-12-19).
